title: DartBot
seoTitle: Game of Darts DartBot | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how DartBot appears in Match play, how access is unlocked, and how the current DartBot level setting is exposed.
summary: DartBot is the app's AI opponent for Match play, available with Pro, DartBot, or 48-hour premium access.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts DartBot image

sections.heading: Meet DartBot
paragraphs: DartBot is the built-in AI opponent for Game of Darts, allowing you to practise, improve your game and enjoy a match whenever another player isn't available.
Whether you're learning the basics or sharpening your checkout accuracy, DartBot provides a reliable opponent that's always ready to play.

sections.heading: AI Difficulty
paragraphs: DartBot supports multiple skill levels so players of all abilities can enjoy competitive matches. Adjust the difficulty to create anything from a relaxed practice session to a challenging contest.
The selected difficulty is remembered by the app until you decide to change it.
bullets: Suitable for beginners through experienced players.
Difficulty can be changed from the Settings page.
Your selected level is used when creating new DartBot matches.

sections.heading: Playing Against DartBot
paragraphs: Create a new Match game, add yourself as the player, then choose DartBot as your opponent. Once the match begins, DartBot plays using the selected AI difficulty and follows the same rules as a human player.
DartBot is ideal for practising checkouts, testing different match formats and improving consistency without needing another person.

sections.heading: Unlocking DartBot
paragraphs: DartBot is available through the dedicated DartBot unlock, the full Pro upgrade or the 48-hour premium pass. Once unlocked, it can be used whenever you create a supported Match game.
Your unlock is linked to your purchase and does not affect player statistics, saved games or Game Center progress.

images.alt: Artwork for Game of Darts DartBot
images.caption: DartBot artwork

featureShowcases.heading: Practise against DartBot
featureShowcases.summary: DartBot gives players an AI opponent for Match play when another human player is not available.
body: This matters because regular practice is easier when players can start a competitive-feeling match on demand. DartBot lets players work on consistency, checkouts, and match rhythm without waiting for an opponent.
Players use DartBot by creating a supported Match game, adding themselves, and choosing DartBot as the opponent.
bullets: Supports solo practice in a match-style format.
Uses the selected DartBot level when new DartBot matches are created.
Works alongside match setup, statistics, and premium access.

image.caption: DartBot artwork supports the AI opponent workflow.

featureShowcases.heading: Set the challenge level
featureShowcases.summary: DartBot difficulty and access are part of the wider settings and premium workflow.
body: This matters because players need an opponent that fits their current level. A relaxed practice session and a checkout-focused challenge should not feel the same.
Players use settings to adjust the DartBot level, then use premium access options where DartBot needs to be unlocked.
bullets: Difficulty can be changed from settings.
DartBot access can be unlocked through supported premium options.
The chosen level applies to future DartBot matches.

image.alt: Game of Darts settings screen for DartBot and gameplay options
image.caption: Settings artwork supports DartBot level and access configuration.
